'''Kompa''' was a Human male residing on [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] during the time of the [[Phantom Project|Phantom Affair]]. He was advising his friend on which history texts to study, as he himself had passed a course on the subject, when an [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|escaped prisoner]] burst into the room. Not wanting to be put in any danger, he and his friend handed over their weapons and let the prisoner pass them.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]] {{1st}}

[[File:KompaAntilles-XWingRogueSquadron7.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] escapes captivity.]]
